Analysis Inhaler

Author

Joana

Published

April 28, 2026

Research question:
Does a new inhaled corticosteroid (ICS-X) perform better in a Randomized control trial over 6 weeks in patients with mild persistent asthma compared to a standard inhaler?

1 Prepare session

In this step the Quarto project has been prepared for the analysis of the data set lung function which contains 180 data points of distinct patients. The data set displays information about the age, FEV-1 improvement, baseline FEV-1, treatment group and smoking status.

2 Explore the data

To look at the different inhalation methods, the dataset is analyzed numerically and graphically.

2.1 Numerically

For the numerical exploration of the data, first the tabel Table 1 has been created, with which the descriptive statistics can be looked at.

To get information about the proportion in which the various treatments have been used, the tabel Table 2 has been created.

Another important factor in the analysis is the smoking status. The Table 3 serves to further elaborate the smoking status of the participants.

2.2 Graphically

To get a further impression of the data, it can be displayed graphically. The first step is to compare the treatment groups with Figure 1.

With the second Figure 2, the distribution of the FEV1 improvement can be explored.

3 Fit models

After the initial graphical and numerical exploration of the data, the models have been fit (Table 4). As we have a continous outcome variable (FEV1 improvement), the data is fitted with a linear model.

3.1 Formulate and compare

After fitting and comparing the models, m3 has been chosen to continue as it has the lowest AIC and BIC and the highest adjusted R^2. M3 has an adjusted R^2 has a 0.47.

3.2 Validate the preferred model

Before the chosen model can be interpreted, it has to be validated. To do so, the Figure 3 has been created. Model 3 works well to continue with.

Code 
check_model(m3)

4 Interpret model

As m3 has been chosen and validated, the data interpretation can continue with it.
